case_number: Crl. Bail Application No. S-911 of 2024

chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No. S-911 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA No. 1195/2025 (Return of surety) O R D E R. 30-06-2025. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G for the State. _____*******______ Applicant is called absent. Learned APG submits that accused Mumtaz Ali Ansari has been granted bail by this Court and he is still facing trial before the trial Court; therefore, question of release the surety papers does not arises till conclusion of the case or withdrawal of surety. In view of above situation, the listed application is dismissed. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
